texto: I pointed, still unable to utter a word. Tim looked down at the spectacle behind the shed, his face swiftly draining of color. He gripped my arm with a clammy hand. And then he did something I'd been waiting half my life to see: he dropped into a dead swoon at my feet.
explicacao: Citação de Rosie Genova sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “I pointed, still unable to utter a word.
